title: Section 2
content: No carriage shall be used as a stage-carriage unless licensed by a 1Magistrate or by the 2*** Commissioner of Police of a Presidency-town.
footnote: 1. For definition of "Magistrate", see s. 21, infra. 2. The word "Chief" rep. by Act 10 of 1914, s. 3 and the Second Schedule.
